data.title: Service-Oriented Architecture
data.description: Spotify employs a service-oriented architecture with services communicating over the network.
data.technical_spec: Microservices deployed on Kubernetes, using gRPC for communication.

data.title: Data Infrastructure
data.description: A robust data pipeline architecture that supports real-time analytics and user behavior tracking.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka for messaging, Hadoop and Google BigQuery for data processing.

data.title: Scalable Backend Systems
data.description: Designed to handle millions of concurrent users streaming music across the globe.
data.technical_spec: Built using Java, Python, and Node.js, deployed on AWS.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Utilizes CDNs for efficient distribution of media content to users globally.
data.technical_spec: Partnered with third-party CDN providers like Akamai and Cloudflare.

data.title: Highly Available Streaming Services
data.description: Ensures uninterrupted music streaming with minimal latency.
data.technical_spec: Global server presence with load balancing and fault tolerance.
